name: Tandoori Style Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 Limes or Lemons, cut into wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard the wing, rib bones, and back bones of the skinned chicken halves.
2. Make shallow gashes all over the chicken with a sharp knife.
3. Rub the chicken with salt and lime or lemon juice.
4. In a large bowl, combine yogurt, garlic, cayenne, cumin, coriander, ginger, red food coloring (optional), and black pepper to make the marinade.
5. Brush the chicken thoroughly with the marinade mixture, ensuring it penetrates the gashes.
6. Refrigerate the marinated chicken for 4 to 5 hours or overnight.
7. Preheat the oven or broiler to 450°F.
8. Thread each chicken half onto a long metal skewer and cook for 5 minutes on one side.
9. Turn the chicken over and cook for another 5 minutes on the other side.
10. Brush with melted butter and continue cooking for 10 more minutes on each side, or until the chicken is cooked through and golden brown.
11. Sprinkle with remaining lime or lemon juice and black pepper.
12. Garnish with lime or lemon wedges and tomato and onion slices.
13. Serve hot.
